html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: The Forge

The Ancient Anchor is a structure found by the Ancient Gateway in the Forge event. It currently does not have any use. The game files reveal that it has an active state.

Gallery

  • Image textures for the Ancient Anchor and its key found in the game files.
  • Image textures for the Ancient Anchor's key found in the game files.
  • An Ancient Anchor with its key.

Ancient Anchor
Miscellaneous
lavaarena_keyhole
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: The Forge
“It needs a key.”
–Wilson
“There's no key in it.”
–Willow
“Nothing here.”
–Wolfgang
“Empty as my heart.”
–Wendy
“NO POWER”
–WX-78
“It requires a key.”
–Wickerbottom
“Needs another piece.”
–Woodie
“A key is key.”
–Maxwell
“The Rainböw Bridge cönceals itself.”
–Wigfrid
“It doesn't have its key.”
–Webber
“That's our way back.”
–Warly
“Where's key?”
–Wormwood
“Can't go home without the key.”
–Winona
“It's a one-piece puzzle.”
–Wortox
“Something go in there...”
–Wurt
“It needs a key.”
–Walter
“It needs a key.”
–Wanda
The Ancient Anchor is a structure found by the Ancient Gateway in the Forge event. It currently does not have any use. The game files reveal that it has an active state.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mỏ Neo Cổ là một công trình được tìm thấy bởi Cổng Cổ trong sự kiện Lò rèn. Hiện tại nó không có tác dụng gì. Các tập tin trò chơi tiết lộ rằng nó có trạng thái hoạt động.

The '''Ancient Anchor''' is a structure found by the Ancient Gateway in the [[Forge]] event. It currently does not have any use. The game files reveal that it has an active state.
